## Features

- Added a full app appearance system with 8 dark themes and 8 light themes.
- Added the Explorer footer theme controls with a follow-system switch and a theme selector button on the same row.
- Added follow-system theme memory: MDE remembers the last selected dark and light theme independently, then switches between them with the OS appearance.
- Kept theme selection available while following system appearance; in that mode, the selector only shows the current system family and does not leave follow-system mode after choosing a theme.
- Added 4 light themes whose Explorer left panel is also light: Manuscript, Porcelain, Sage Paper, and Mint.
- Added themed rendering for the BlockNote editor and Mermaid flowchart preview so editor content follows the resolved light or dark appearance.

## Bug Fixes

- Made the theme picker dialog columns equal width for Dark and Light theme groups.
- Kept the theme footer controls compact and aligned on one row.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added a typed theme preference model and localStorage persistence helpers.
- Tokenized the app shell, Explorer, dialogs, editor surfaces, and flowchart preview with semantic theme CSS variables.
- Updated `docs/requirements/support-multi-themes.md` with the final 8 dark / 8 light requirement, follow-system selection behavior, and light-panel theme requirement.
- Added unit coverage for theme counts, light-panel theme metadata, malformed preference fallback, system resolution, selection behavior, and persistence.
- Added E2E coverage for manual theme persistence, follow-system family-restricted selection, OS appearance changes, equal-width theme picker columns, and the default light-panel theme.

## Verification

- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm audit --audit-level=high`
- `npm run build`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm audit --audit-level=high` passed with no high-severity findings; npm reported existing transitive moderate `uuid` advisories through `mermaid`.

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon: `MDE-1.2.7-mac-arm64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.7-mac-arm64.zip`
- macOS Intel: `MDE-1.2.7-mac-x64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.7-mac-x64.zip`
- Windows x64: `MDE-1.2.7-win-x64.exe`, `MDE-1.2.7-win-x64.exe.blockmap`, `latest.yml`
